creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #0)
I do have these settings in my poudriere.conf, but I was in a rush trying to do a favor for tcberner and didn't thoroughly test this. <:(

Thanks for the report, though! Serendipitously, my blunder and your subsequent report led me to fixing another problem in the kde stack that would have likely gone overlooked even with proper build tests.
